findings.description: The h2 section '実装方針' contains two h3 subsections ('iOSエラー処理実装方針' and 'initWithDictionaryメソッド実装方法') in the source, but both are merged into a single knowledge section s2. The combined content substantially exceeds 2000 characters. Per V3 rules, h2 sections with >= 2000 chars and existing h3 subsections should be split into separate knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings: 'iOSエラー処理実装方針' and 'initWithDictionaryメソッド実装方法', both under h2 '実装方針'

findings.location: s2 — initWithDictionaryメソッド実装方法 code example
findings.description: The source code example includes `@implementation NMAesEncryption` wrapper with three `@synthesize` declarations (`keyManager`, `nmMode`, `nmPaddingType`). The knowledge file omits the `@implementation` block and all `@synthesize` lines, meaning the `keyManager` property is not mentioned anywhere in the knowledge file. An AI answering questions about NMAesEncryption's properties would miss `keyManager`.
